set.usernameTooShort: Username must be at least 3 characters
set.pwdTooShort: Password must be at least 6 characters
set.backupDesc: Create encrypted snapshots of OpenClaw config for selective restore
set.backupSecurityNote: Snapshots are password-protected and encrypted. Keep your password safe: it cannot be recovered if lost.
set.snapshotDesc: Create encrypted backups and restore only the resources or config paths you choose.
set.snapshotDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this backup? This action cannot be undone.
set.snapshotSecurityNote: Backups are encrypted with your password. A password must be at least 6 characters.
set.snapshotPasswordTooShort: Backup password must be at least 6 characters
set.snapshotRestoreConfirm: Restore the selected backup items now? Current local files and config paths may be overwritten.
set.snapshotSchedulePasswordUpdate: Keep empty to keep current password
set.snapshotScheduleSaveFailed: Failed to save scheduled backup settings
set.snapshotScheduleInvalidRetention: Retention count must be between 1 and 365
set.snapshotSchedulePasswordRequired: Set a password before enabling scheduled backup
set.configBackupDesc: View and restore OpenClaw configuration backup files (.bak) automatically created on every config change
set.configBackupNotInstalled: OpenClaw not installed or config path not found
set.configBackupRestoreConfirm: Are you sure you want to restore this backup? The current config will be overwritten.
set.ocBackupDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this backup archive?
set.restoreBuildPlanHint: Review what will be changed before restoring
set.snapshotRestoreConfirmWithRestart: Restore will apply selected files and automatically restart the gateway. This may take a moment. Continue?
set.snapshotRestoreOkRestarted: Restore completed and gateway has been restarted.
set.snapshotRestoreOkRestartFailed: Restore completed, but gateway restart failed:
set.snapshotOcImportPwdHint: Set password for encrypted storage (min 6 chars)
set.snapshotOcImportNote: The .tar.gz backup will be re-encrypted with your password and stored securely.
set.snapshotOcExportDesc: Decrypt and export as a standard .tar.gz archive with manifest.json, compatible with OpenClaw CLI.
set.snapshotBatchDeleteConfirm: Delete {n} selected backups? This cannot be undone.
set.snapshotPruneDesc: Keep the most recent N backups and delete all older ones.
set.snapshotPruneConfirm: Keep the latest {n} backups and delete the rest?
set.auditDesc: Track all user operations for security auditing
set.openclawUpdateDesc: Check if a newer version of OpenClaw is available
set.updateCannotConnect: Cannot connect to GitHub. Please check your network or download manually
set.updateGithubServerError: GitHub server is temporarily unavailable, please try again later
set.updateGithubRateLimited: GitHub API rate limit reached, please try again later
set.updateGithubApiError: Unable to connect to GitHub, please check your network
set.selfUpdateDesc: Check and update ClawDeckX to the latest version
set.selfUpdateNoAsset: No update package available for this platform
set.updateChannelStableDesc: Stable channel provides tested releases recommended for production use.
set.updateChannelBetaDesc: Beta channel includes pre-release versions with the latest features but may be less stable.
set.accessSecurityDesc: Configure network access settings for ClawDeckX. Restart required after changes.
set.corsOriginsHint: Origins allowed for cross-origin access. Empty = same-origin only.
set.accessSaved: Access config saved. Restart required to take effect.
set.restartHint: Browser will reconnect automatically after restart
set.donateLine1: ClawDeckX was born from passion, grown through persistence.
set.donateLine2: Code written in the quiet of night, interfaces shaped with simplicity.
set.donateLine3: If it saves you time and effort,
set.donateLine4: your support is the light that keeps it moving forward.
set.donateThankYou: Open source is hard. Your usage is the greatest support!
set.donateFeedback: Submit bug reports or feature requests
set.aboutIntro: ClawDeckX is an open-source web visual control panel built for OpenClaw, bringing together guided setup, graphical configuration, real-time monitoring, multilingual support, and local and remote gateway management. It is designed to lower the barrier to entry, making OpenClaw easier to use, observe, and optimize, especially for beginners.
set.aboutNote: This is my first open-source project, and I hope it will continue to improve with the help of the community. If you run into any issues or have ideas for improvement, feel free to submit an Issue or Pull Request. Thank you for your support. Every piece of feedback helps this project grow.
set.notifyDesc: Configure external notification channels for alerts. Supports reusing OpenClaw channel tokens.
set.notifyTgTokenHint: Leave empty to reuse the Telegram Bot Token from OpenClaw config
set.notifyTgChatIdHint: Enter the Telegram user or group Chat ID to receive notifications
set.notifyDdTokenHint: The access_token from DingTalk group bot Webhook URL
set.notifyDdSecretHint: Signing secret (starts with SEC). Leave empty to skip signing.
set.notifyLarkUrlHint: Custom bot Webhook URL from Lark/Feishu
set.notifyDcTokenHint: Leave empty to reuse the Discord Bot Token from OpenClaw config
set.notifyDcChannelIdHint: Discord channel ID to receive notifications
set.notifySlackTokenHint: Leave empty to reuse the Slack Bot Token from OpenClaw config
set.notifyWebhookTemplateHint: Use {message} as placeholder. Leave empty for plain text.
set.notifyReuseHint: Detected Telegram in OpenClaw config. You can reuse the Bot Token — just enter a Chat ID.
set.serviceAutoStartDesc: Register as a system service to automatically start on boot. Once installed, the gateway will run in the background without manual intervention.
set.serviceDockerDesc: Running inside a Docker container. Auto-start is managed by Docker restart policy and the container entrypoint script. No system service registration is needed.
set.runtimeOverlayDesc: Updates are stored in a persistent volume so they survive container restarts and recreations. No need to rebuild the Docker image for every update.
set.runtimeRollbackConfirm: Revert to the version bundled in the Docker image? The runtime overlay will be removed.
set.runtimeRestartHint: Restart the container to activate the updated binary
set.logoutConfirm: Log out of the current session? You will need to sign in again with your username and password.
set.logoutDesc: End the current session and return to the login screen. You will need to sign in again next time.

pref.title: Preferences
pref.windowControlsDesc: Choose where the close, minimize, and maximize buttons appear on windows.
pref.wallpaperGradientDesc: Use the built-in desktop gradient background.
pref.wallpaperImageDesc: Overlay a remote image on top of the desktop gradient.
pref.wallpaperRandomDesc: Prefer Wallhaven each refresh, then fall back to Bing Daily if needed.
pref.wallpaperWallhavenDesc: Use Wallhaven wallpaper search as the primary source.
pref.wallpaperPicsumDesc: Always use Bing Daily as the wallpaper source.
pref.wallpaperUnsplashDesc: Always use Unsplash as the wallpaper source.
pref.wallpaperCustomDesc: Use the image URL you provide below.
pref.wallpaperWallhavenQueryDesc: Keywords sent to Wallhaven search, for example landscape scenery, mountains, cyberpunk city.
pref.wallpaperWallhavenApiKeyDesc: Optional. Needed for authenticated search settings and sketchy content access.
pref.wallpaperCacheHint: Wallpaper is cached locally. It refreshes automatically every 24 hours.
pref.startupWindowDesc: Choose which window opens automatically when you enter the desktop.

mirror.title: Mirror Acceleration & Network
mirror.desc: Configure npm, GitHub, Docker, pip, Go mirrors for faster access
mirror.presetHint: One-click switch between network presets, auto-fills all recommended mirrors
mirror.detectHint: Detect current system-level mirror configuration for each tool
mirror.applyAllOk: All mirror settings applied to system
mirror.applyAllPartial: Some settings applied. Check individual tools for details.
mirror.dockerRestartHint: Docker mirror changes take effect after restarting the Docker daemon. Run `sudo systemctl restart docker` or restart from Docker Desktop.
mirror.scopeHint: Apply to system = writes ~/.npmrc · go env · ~/.pip/pip.conf · ~/.gitconfig · daemon.json
